evidence.claim: The system allows withdrawal operations to be atomic.
evidence.fact: The system processes each withdrawal atomically.

evidence.claim: A failure occurs during the transaction.
evidence.fact: If a requested cash amount is larger than the available funds or surpasses the twenty-four-hour spending ceiling, the transaction is rejected.
evidence.fact_span: If a requested cash amount is larger than the available funds or surpasses the twenty-four-hour spending ceiling, the transaction is rejected

evidence.claim: The user's account balance remains unchanged.
evidence.fact: A user's money is never lost or duplicated due to partial failures, because the system reverts every alteration when an error occurs.
evidence.user_story_span: the user's account balance remains unchanged
evidence.fact_span: A user's money is never lost or duplicated due to partial failures, because the system reverts every alteration when an error occurs

evidence.claim: The transaction is fully rolled back.
evidence.fact: The system rolls back all steps completely if any step fails.
evidence.user_story_span: the transaction is fully rolled back
evidence.fact_span: rolls back all steps completely if any step fails

evidence.claim: Atomicity ensures that a withdrawal either completes entirely or has no effect.
evidence.fact: The transaction is processed in an all-or-nothing fashion, guaranteeing full rollback of any partial work on failure.
evidence.user_story_span: Atomicity ensures that a withdrawal either completes entirely or has no effect
evidence.fact_span: The transaction is processed in an all-or-nothing fashion, guaranteeing full rollback of any partial work on failure

evidence.fact: A user must present their bank card and enter their secret code to begin any cash withdrawal operation.
evidence.fact_span: A user must present their bank card and enter their secret code to begin any cash withdrawal operation
